abilities.description: Put a mire counter on target non-Swamp land. That land is a Swamp for as long as it has a mire counter on it. Activate only during your upkeep.

triggers.description: When CARDNAME is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, at the beginning of each of your upkeeps for the rest of the game, remove all mire counters from a land that a mire counter was put onto with CARDNAME but that a mire counter has not been removed from with CARDNAME.
